assets.author: TotTaps / OpenAI image generation
assets.usage: Toddler game sprites for Shadow Matcher, Find & Tap, and future learning games
assets.notes: Generated from original generic prompts for TotTaps. Avoids brand characters, logos, labels, and franchise-specific styles.

notes: Add one entry per third-party asset before using it in TotTaps.
Prefer original or CC0 assets. Use CC-BY only when credits are published.
Do not add assets with unclear, personal-use-only, or brand-derived licenses.
